home.servicesHeading: All Car Key & Locksmith Services in Dubai
home.servicesSubtext: From a simple spare key to full smart key programming for a European luxury car — we handle every automotive key and lock need across Dubai, on-site at your location.
home.howItWorksSubtext: Three steps from stranded to sorted. No towing, no dealership, no waiting days.
home.step1Desc: Call +971 52 642 6161 or send a WhatsApp message. Tell us your location, key type or lock issue and the service you need. We confirm availability and give you an upfront price in under 2 minutes.
home.step2Desc: A certified mobile technician is dispatched immediately from our Al Bada'a base or nearest available unit. We reach most Dubai locations in 20–45 minutes — no need to tow your car or visit a workshop.
home.step3Desc: Our technician carries professional key-cutting machines, OBD programming tools and diagnostic equipment. Most jobs are completed in a single visit — you get a tested, working key before we leave.
home.gallerySubtext: From a Nissan door key to a Bentley smart key — tap any photo to see the full service and pricing.
home.galleryFootnote: All services available 24/7 · Mobile across all Dubai areas · Price confirmed before work starts
home.satwaHeading: The Nearest Key Maker to Al Satwa
home.satwaSubtext: Lock Repair Satwa at D90, Al Bada'a is the closest key shop and locksmith to Al Satwa Road, Queen's Medical Centre, and Al Diyafa Street. Walk in for instant key duplication, or call for mobile service anywhere in Dubai.

home.locationsSubtext: From our Al Bada'a base, our mobile technicians reach 15+ major Dubai areas. Whether you're in Downtown, Dubai Marina, JVC or International City — we come to you.
home.aboutHeading: Dubai's Professional Locksmith — Satwa & Al Bada'a
home.aboutPara1: Lock Repair Satwa is a professional locksmith based at D90, Al Bada'a, Dubai. We serve all major Dubai areas with expert lock repair, car key duplication, and security solutions — without the days of waiting and premium markup that franchised dealerships charge. Rated 4.7★ on Google by our customers.
home.aboutPara2: Our certified technicians carry professional key-cutting machines, OBD programming equipment and a comprehensive stock of key blanks for 50+ vehicle brands. We cover every type of locksmith service — from a basic spare key to full smart key programming for the latest European luxury vehicles — all performed at your location.

about.pageTitle: About Lock Repair Satwa — Dubai's Trusted Locksmith
about.pageDescription: Learn about Lock Repair Satwa, Dubai's professional locksmith based in Al Bada'a. 10+ years experience, 50+ car brands, 4.7★ Google rating.
about.heroHeading: Dubai's Professional Locksmith Since Day One
about.heroSubtext: Lock Repair Satwa — trusted by thousands of Dubai residents and businesses for car keys, door locks and security solutions.
about.story1: Lock Repair Satwa was founded by experienced automotive locksmiths who saw a gap in the Dubai market: residents needed a reliable, transparent, and affordable locksmith that would come to them — not the other way around.
about.story2: Based at D90, Al Bada'a — minutes from Al Satwa — we built our reputation one satisfied customer at a time. Today, we serve all major Dubai areas with a fleet of fully-equipped mobile units.
about.experienceDesc: Certified automotive locksmiths with over a decade in the UAE market, trained on all major brands and the latest smart key technologies.
about.brandsDesc: From everyday Toyota Land Cruisers and Nissan Patrols to BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Tesla and ultra-luxury European models.
about.ratingDesc: Rated by real, verified customers on Google Maps — our reputation is built on quality work and honest pricing.
about.mobileDesc: We bring our professional equipment directly to you — at home, the office, the mall or the roadside. No towing required.
about.transparentDesc: You receive a firm, upfront quote before any work starts. No hidden fees, no surprises — what we quote is what you pay.
about.certifiedDesc: All technicians are trained, certified and insured. We operate in full compliance with Dubai Municipality regulations.
about.cert2: Trained on OBD Key Programming Systems
about.teamDesc: Our team of certified automotive locksmiths brings decades of combined experience to every job. Each technician carries professional key-cutting machines, OBD programming tools and a comprehensive stock of key blanks.
about.ctaHeading: Ready to Work With Dubai's Best Locksmith?
about.ctaSubtext: Call or WhatsApp now. Upfront pricing, fast response, and certified technicians.
